answer: We have that $x+\frac{1}{z}=5$ and $y+\frac{1}{x}=29$. Multiplying the first equation by $z$ and the second equation by $x$ gives $x^2 + 1 = 5z$ and $xy + 1 = 29x$. Rearranging the first equation gives $x^2 - 5z = -1$. Rearranging the second equation gives $xy = 29x - 1$. We can substitute $xy$ into the first equation to get $x(29x - 1) - 5z = -1$. This simplifies to $29x^2 - x - 5z = -1$. Rearranging this equation gives $29x^2 - x - 5z + 1 = 0$. We can substitute $x^2 = 5z - 1$ into this equation to get $29(5z - 1) - x - 5z + 1 = 0$. This simplifies to $145z - 29 - x - 5z + 1 = 0$. This simplifies to $140z - x - 28 = 0$. Rearranging this equation gives $x = 140z - 28$. We can substitute this into the equation $xy = 29x - 1$ to get $(140z - 28)y = 29(140z - 28) - 1$. This simplifies to $140zy - 28y = 4060z - 812 - 1$. This simplifies to $140zy - 28y = 4060z - 813$. Rearranging this equation gives $140zy - 4060z = 28y - 813$. Factoring out $z$ gives $z(140y - 4060) = 28y - 813$. Dividing both sides by $28$ gives $\frac{z(140y - 4060)}{28} = \frac{28y - 813}{28}$. This simplifies to $5z(14y - 406) = y - \frac{813}{28}$. Rearranging this equation gives $5z(14y - 406) - y = -\frac{813}{28}$. Multiplying both sides by $28$ gives $70z(14y - 406) - 28y = -813$. This simplifies to $980z y - 28420z - 28y = -813$. Rearranging this equation gives $980zy - 28y = 28420z - 813$. Factoring out $y$ gives $y(980z - 28) = 28420z - 813$. Dividing both sides by $28$ gives $\frac{y(980z - 28)}{28} = \frac{28420z - 813}{28}$. This simplifies to $35y(28z - 1) = 1015z - \frac{813}{28}$. Rearranging this equation gives $35y(28z - 1) = 1015z - \frac{813}{28}$. Multiplying both sides by $\frac{28}{35}$ gives $28y(28z - 1) = \frac{1015z}{35} - \frac{813}{70}$. This simplifies to $784yz - 28y = \frac{1015z}{35} - \frac{813}{70}$. Rearranging this equation gives $784yz - \frac{1015z}{35} = \frac{28y}{1} - \frac{813}{70}$. Multiplying both sides by $35$ gives $27440yz - 1015z = 980y - 813$. Rearranging this equation gives $27440yz - 980y = 1015z - 813$. Factoring out $y$ gives $y(27440z - 980) = 1015z - 813$. Dividing both sides by $980$ gives $\frac{y(27440z - 980)}{980} = \frac{1015z - 813}{980}$. This simplifies to $\frac{y(280z - 10)}{10} = \frac{1015z - 813}{980}$. This simplifies to $28y(28z - 1) = \frac{1015z - 813}{70}$. Multiplying both sides by $70$ gives $1960yz - 28y = 1015z - 813$. Rearranging this equation gives $1960yz - 1015z = 28y - 813$. Factoring out $z$ gives $z(1960y - 1015) = 28y - 813$. Dividing both sides by $28$ gives $\frac{z(1960y - 1015)}{28} = \frac{28y - 813}{28}$.
